calculation: Row sum of the five historical donation amounts
business_meaning: Measures total known giving during the five-year historical window.
Measures average annual giving across the complete historical window.

calculation: Row median of the five historical donation amounts
business_meaning: Provides a donation-size measure that is less sensitive to extreme gifts.

calculation: Row maximum of the five historical donation amounts
business_meaning: Represents the donor's largest known historical gift.

calculation: Row minimum of the five historical donation amounts
business_meaning: Describes the donor's lowest annual giving value in the historical window.

calculation: Population standard deviation across the five historical amounts
business_meaning: Measures variation in annual donation amounts.

calculation: Historical donation total divided by the number of years with donations greater than zero; 0 when no active years exist
business_meaning: Measures typical gift size only during years when the donor gave.

calculation: Count of historical donation amounts greater than zero
business_meaning: Measures how many of the five historical years contained a donation.
Expresses historical giving frequency as a proportion of the available years.
Separates people with any known historical donation from non-donors.
Identifies donors who gave during multiple historical years.
Identifies donors with repeated giving across most of the historical window.

calculation: Longest consecutive sequence of historical years with donation > 0
business_meaning: Measures continuity of historical donation activity.

calculation: 1 when donated in at least two years and the maximum streak is shorter than the total active-year count; otherwise 0
business_meaning: Identifies repeat donors whose giving occurred in separated periods.

calculation: 0 for a donation in the most recent historical year, 1–4 for progressively older donations, and 6 when no historical donation exists
business_meaning: Measures how recently the person donated using the available annual data.
Identifies donors active in the most recent completed historical year.

calculation: 1 when either of the two most recent historical amounts is > 0
business_meaning: Identifies donors with relatively recent historical activity.

calculation: 1 when historical donation activity exists but no donation occurred during the two most recent historical years
business_meaning: Identifies prior donors whose recent activity has stopped.
Identifies people with no donation in the available historical window.

calculation: First positive donation found when searching from the most recent historical year to the oldest; 0 when none exist
business_meaning: Captures the amount of the donor's most recent known gift.

calculation: Mean of the two most recent historical amounts minus the mean of the three older historical amounts
business_meaning: Measures whether recent giving is higher or lower than older giving.

calculation: Mean of the two most recent historical amounts divided by the mean of the three older amounts; missing when the older average is zero
business_meaning: Measures proportional change between recent and older giving periods.

calculation: Linear trend slope across the five donation amounts ordered from oldest to most recent
business_meaning: Measures whether annual donation amounts generally increased or decreased.
Measures the most recent year-over-year change in donation amount.

calculation: Historical donation standard deviation divided by historical mean; 0 when the mean is zero
business_meaning: Measures donation volatility relative to average giving.
Identifies zero denominators that can create extreme trajectory ratios.
Measures proportional year-over-year donation change.
Compresses extreme year-over-year donation ratios.
Provides a skew-resistant version of the historical five-year donation total.
Provides a skew-resistant version of the historical five-year average donation.
Provides a skew-resistant version of the largest historical annual donation.
Provides a skew-resistant version of the most recent positive historical donation.

calculation: Trim and standardize case; retain Female and Male; map unknown spellings and missing values to Unknown; group remaining rare named categories into Other
business_meaning: Provides a consistent gender category for modeling.

calculation: 1 when the original gender value was missing or blank; otherwise 0
business_meaning: Preserves whether gender information was originally absent.

calculation: Trim and standardize address categories; map missing or unusable values to Missing and infrequent categories to Other
business_meaning: Provides a consistent preferred address category.

calculation: 1 when the original address type was missing or unusable; otherwise 0
business_meaning: May reflect a meaningful contact-data collection pattern.

calculation: Convert to string, trim whitespace, remove numeric .0 suffix, standardize missing tokens, and pad numeric codes to five digits
business_meaning: Preserves cleaned geography but remains too high-cardinality for the baseline model.

calculation: 1 when the standardized postal code is missing; otherwise 0
business_meaning: May capture differences in contact-record completeness.

calculation: First three digits extracted from a valid numeric postal code
business_meaning: Provides less granular geography for a separate comparison model.

calculation: Prefixes with fewer than 87 records mapped to Other; missing prefixes mapped to Missing
business_meaning: Discarded because grouping reduced the feature mainly to prefix 902 versus Other.
